problem id: aba5a35d
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(4) XOR SHR(2)

examples:
  11011000 -> 10111011
  10101101 -> 11110001
  10111100 -> 11100100
  01011001 -> 10000011
  00011011 -> 10110111
  01101001 -> 10001100
  01011100 -> 11010010
  01100010 -> 00111110
  01110101 -> 01001010
  11000011 -> 00001100

query: 00110101
predicted answer: 01011110
